mnemonics: IOT Converges: Imagine Operational Technology (OT) and Information Technology (IT) shaking hands over a network.
keyPoints: IT (Information Technology) focuses on data-centric computing systems for business operations.
OT (Operational Technology) monitors and controls physical devices in industrial environments.
IoT acts as the bridge, converging IT and OT by connecting physical OT devices to IT data networks for analytics and control.
commonMistakes: Thinking IT and OT are the same; they have historically different purposes (data vs. physical control).
Assuming convergence is simple; it introduces new cybersecurity risks to previously isolated OT systems.
